abena.motivation: Creativity takes courage and a steady hand.

ZZ.motivation: and when we speak we are afraid our words will not be heard nor welcomed, but when we are silent we are still afraid, So it is better to speak, remembering we were never meant to survive.
ZZ.recommendation: The Black Unicorn Poems by Audre Lorde

guest.motivation: Every great journey begins with a single step.
guest.recommendation: The Design of Everyday Things by Don Norman
